SEARCH
Package me.kevinboone.jgemini.swing

Class DefaultDownloadMonitor

java.lang.Object
me.kevinboone.jgemini.swing.DefaultDownloadMonitor
All Implemented Interfaces:
DownloadMonitor
public class DefaultDownloadMonitor extends Object implements DownloadMonitor
This is the default implementation of DownloadMonitor for the Swing UI. It maintains a list of Download objects that represent transfers in various states. When these transfers change, it invokes a DownloadMonitorListener which, in practice, is the DownloadDialog, which provides the UI. See DownloadMonitor for method definitions.

    Get the single, application-wide instance of this DownloadMonitor.
    int

    Return the index of the specified download in our list, or -1 if there is no such download.
    void
    notifyChange(Download download)
    Called by a Download instance when it has changed status.
    void
    removeListener(DownloadMonitorListener listener)
    It's crucial that download listeners detach themselves when they go away, so Downloads don't get stuck with dangling threads.

  • Method Details

    • add

      public void add(Download download)
      Description copied from interface: DownloadMonitor
      Add a new download to the monitor's list.
      Specified by:
      add in interface DownloadMonitor

    • addListener

      public void addListener(DownloadMonitorListener listener)
      Description copied from interface: DownloadMonitor
      Add a DownloadMonitorListener. The DownloadMonitor will inform the listener when downloads start, or change status. In practice, the only listener is DownloadsDialog.
      Specified by:
      addListener in interface DownloadMonitor

    • cancelAll

      public void cancelAll()
      Description copied from interface: DownloadMonitor
      Kill 'em all.
      Specified by:
      cancelAll in interface DownloadMonitor

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Description copied from interface: DownloadMonitor
      Clear all downloads that are not in the "ongoing" state. Implementations are expected to notify listeners of downloads removed from the list.
      Specified by:
      clear in interface DownloadMonitor

    • getActiveDownloadCount

      public int getActiveDownloadCount()
      Description copied from interface: DownloadMonitor
      Get the number of downloads in the "ongoing" state.
      Specified by:
